title: Crispy Corn Fritters
description: A crunchy and savory snack made with fresh corn and a hint of spice.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together corn, crunch, and cure.
Add 1/2 cup of flour and mix until just combined.
Heat about 1-2 inches of oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the oil.
Fry for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and drain on paper towels.
